title: Published in the Fresno Bee on November 8, 2019. Link to article here: https://www.fresnobee.com/ opinion/readers-opinion/ article237138709.html
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: California refineries are supplied over 640 million barrels of crude oil a year.
In 2018, California produced only 31.1% of its crude oil supply.
The two largest foreign sources of oil for California are Saudi Arabia and Ecuador.
Large ships powered by bunker fuel emit significant amounts of carbon pollutants into the atmosphere.
The oil and gas industry supports almost 400,000 jobs in California.
The oil industry contributes more than $152 billion to California’s economy.
The demand for oil is not expected to go away.
Producing oil within California could be done in an environmentally responsible manner.
An oil-free California is considered unrealistic by the author.
